item.title: Resume
item.description:

🎓 EDUCATION

Northwestern University | McCormick School of Engineering
📆 09/2025 – 12/2026
Master of Science in Computer Science (Ongoing, First Semester)
Relevant Courses: Software Development Studio

The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen | School of Data Science
📆 09/2021 – 06/2025
Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science and Engineering
MGPA: 3.7/4.0
Dean’s List, School of Data Science, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen
Relevant Courses: Data Structure, Design and Analysis of Algorithms, Computer Architectures, Operating Systems, Machine Learning, Computer Networks, Database Systems, Software Engineering, Parallel Computing
